title: iberis simplex
intro: Iberis simplex, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Iberis simplex include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and even help to lower blood pressure. Iberis simplex can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
